claims.found: line 30 'class VADState(Enum):' with QUIET=1, STARTING=2, SPEAKING=3, STOPPING=4 (lines 40-43)

claims.claim: speaking only when confidence >= params.confidence AND volume >= params.min_volume
claims.found: line 206 'speaking = confidence >= self._params.confidence and volume >= self._params.min_volume'

claims.claim: needs start_secs of consecutive speaking frames to reach SPEAKING
needs stop_secs of consecutive silence to return to QUIET

claims.found: line 110 docstring '... If model's current state is SPEECH, values BELOW this value are considered as NON-SPEECH. Default is max(activation_threshold - 0.15, 0.01).'

claims.found: vapi-pipeline-part-2.md:9 'Vapi VAD = state machine, 4 states, different thresholds for starting vs stopping (hysteresis) to prevent nervous switching'; states named QUIET/STARTING/SPEAKING/STOPPING (lines 10-13) under 'Problem #1: Voice Activity Detection'

summary: All 13 checkable assertions verified against ground truth. Pipecat VADState enum, transition table, speaking gate (confidence AND volume), start/stop frame thresholds, and defaults (0.7/0.2/0.2/0.6) all match vad_analyzer.py exactly. LiveKit Silero defaults (min_speech 0.05, min_silence 0.55, activation 0.5, deactivation docstring) match vad.py exactly. Vapi blog and diagram source confirm the 4-state machine, names, hysteresis phrasing, and 200ms/800ms figures verbatim. No WRONG or MISCITED claims.
